# Section index — GENERATED by scripts/build_section_index.py (do not hand-edit)

Greppable map of every knowledge doc → its H2/H3 sections. **Grep a keyword here** to get the exact `path#anchor` to load, instead of reading a whole file. Each doc line carries its frontmatter tags, so keyword hits land on the section heading *or* the doc tags.

Regenerate after editing docs: `python scripts/build_section_index.py` (parallel to `build_registry.py`).
